/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libpulpvp-profile.so -o libpulpvp-profile.so CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/component.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/ports.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/top.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/register.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/signal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/queue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/mapping_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/proxy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/launcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/launcher_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/proxy_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/memcheck.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/jsmn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/json.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/trace/event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/trace/trace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/trace/vcd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/trace/trace_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/clock/clock_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/clock/clock_event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/clock/block_clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/time/block_time.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/time/time_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/time/time_event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/power/power_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/power/power_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/power/block_power.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/power/power_trace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/power/power_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gvsoc_profile.dir/src/stats.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: -lz -lpthread -ldl
